login.title: ZenetHunter
login.subtitle: Local Network Defense System
login.firstUseHint: Administrator account is created during first-run setup. If not completed, go to Setup and finish registration.

setup.welcomeDesc: Create your administrator account to secure the console. You’ll review a safety notice before continuing.
setup.passwordNote: Passwords are stored with modern hashing. Minimum 8 characters.
setup.adminExists: An admin already exists. Please contact the administrator to continue.
setup.safetyDesc: After creating the admin, you must read and acknowledge the safety disclaimer. You’ll need to scroll the notice and wait 30 seconds before continuing.
setup.safetyList3: Close the app if you do not agree.
setup.safetyInfo: The setup will return you to the dashboard after you accept the notice.
setup.modalLead: Please review this notice before using ZenetHunter in your environment.
setup.modalPurposeDesc: ZenetHunter is designed for authorized, private networks to improve visibility and mitigate misuse. Capabilities focus on monitoring, policy enforcement, and protective actions under appropriate oversight.
setup.modalResp1: Operate only with proper authorization and within approved network segments.
setup.modalResp2: Follow applicable laws, internal security policies, and acceptable use guidelines.
setup.modalResp3: Use disruptive features responsibly; notify stakeholders per your policy.
setup.modalSafety1: Some actions interact with devices on the network; review before execution.
setup.modalSafety2: Logging is retained locally; avoid including sensitive personal data.
setup.modalSafety3: If you disagree with these terms, close the application now.
setup.modalFooterHint: Use scroll or mouse wheel to confirm you have read this notice.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure application and system preferences
settings.platformHint: Choose the environment to use matching network scripts.
settings.dangerText: Shutting down the backend server will terminate all running operations, including scans and active defense tasks. All WebSocket connections will be closed.
settings.forceHint: Graceful shutdown failed? Use force shutdown (kills processes immediately)
settings.confirmShutdown: Are you sure you want to shut down the server?
settings.forceFallback: If graceful shutdown is stuck, click force shutdown (will kill the process).
settings.replayDesc: Reset to first launch, clear volatile data and require setup again.
settings.replayConfirmTitle: Do you want to perform Replay/Reset?
settings.replayConfirmDesc: This clears devices, observations, and accounts, resets first-run state. Dictionary files are kept.
settings.replaySuccess: Replay executed. App will return to first-run state.
settings.shutdownFailed: Graceful shutdown failed. Try force shutdown

scan.loginRequired: Please login before starting a scan.
scan.authFailed: Authentication failed: please login again to refresh token.

topology.title: Network Map
topology.emptyHint: Scan your network to visualize the device topology.

notfound.title: Page Not Found
notfound.message: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.

logsPage.title: System Logs & Information
logsPage.subtitle: View application logs and system environment information.

devices.title: Network Devices
devices.searchPlaceholder: Search by Name, IP, MAC or Vendor...
devices.emptyHint: Start a network scan to discover devices on your network.

attack.title: Active Defense Operations
attack.subtitle: Monitor and control active defense tasks in real-time.
attack.noActiveHint: Select a device below to start an attack.
attack.logsEmpty: No operation logs yet. Start an attack to see real-time logs.
attack.allDevicesHint: Select a device to initiate an attack operation.
attack.emptyHint: Run a network scan first to discover devices.
